name: Modernizing Medicine Specialty EHR API
what_it_does: Modernizing Medicine (modmed) REST API for specialty EHR and practice management platform. Enables AI agents to access specialty-specific clinical records (dermatology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, etc.), manage appointment scheduling and patient intake, retrieve procedure and treatment documentation, handle specialty billing and coding, access patient engagement and communication data, integrate with specialty-specific diagnostic tools and imaging, retrieve practice analytics, and connect specialty practice data with health system referral networks.
use_cases: Accessing specialty clinical records and treatment documentation from care coordination agents
Managing specialty practice appointment scheduling from operations agents
Processing specialty billing and CPT coding from revenue cycle agents
Integrating specialty data with health system referral workflows from referral management agents
not_for: Primary care without specialty-specific clinical workflows
Hospital inpatient care without outpatient specialty practice management
Non-clinical specialty practices without specialty EHR documentation
best_when: A dermatology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, gastroenterology, or other specialty practice using modmed EMA wants AI agents to automate specialty documentation, billing, scheduling, and patient engagement.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Specialty clinical records include PHI with specialty-specific sensitivity. Dermatology records include skin condition imaging. Ophthalmology records include vision data. Orthopedic records may include imaging and implant data. BAA required.

auth.notes: Modernizing Medicine uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials with clinical, billing, and scheduling scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Partner marketplace for integrations. FHIR R4 interoperability available. Specialty-specific data models per specialty vertical.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — specialty EHR enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Boca Raton, Florida. Founded 2010. Dominant specialty EHR vendor. Serves dermatology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, gastroenterology, plastic surgery, and ENT specialties. 35,000+ providers. VC-backed (Warburg Pincus). AI-powered specialty templates. Competes with Nextech and specialty modules of Epic/Athena.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Specialty clinical records with specialty-specific sensitivity — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal and partner marketplace
Specialty-specific data models — API structure varies by specialty (dermatology, ophthalmology, etc.)
FHIR R4 available for interoperability — prefer for cross-system clinical data exchange
Skin condition imaging in dermatology records — biometric and visual health data extra sensitivity
Specialty CPT coding automation requires domain expertise to avoid billing errors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Specialty clinical PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 scoped. US data residency. BAA required. Specialty imaging and biometric data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Specialty clinical PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2. US data residency. BAA required. Specialty imaging data.
